title: Parse Crontab for Next Run
description:
Input: a cron expression (5 fields: min hour dom month dow) on the first line, then a reference UTC datetime as `YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS` on the second line.

Only `*` (any) and single integers are valid field values. Return the next UTC datetime (strictly after the reference) when the cron would fire, in `YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS` format. Search up to 4 years ahead.
constraints: Input is a plain string passed to solve(input string) string
Return a string matching the expected output exactly
Return empty string where the problem specifies no results
